title: mentha × rotundifolia f. elongata
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia f. elongata, also known as elongated round mint, is a cultivar of the peppermint plant, characterized by its elongated leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia f. elongata include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating headaches and fever, and providing relief from muscle and joint pain. Elongated round mint can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and topical ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
